2025 Panini Prizm
FOOTBALL • NFL • CHROME TECHNOLOGY
2025 NEW
Top Chase Cards
  • Silver Prizm Rookies
    Base silver parallel — most sought-after rookie insert
    $30 — $400+
  • Gold Prizm /10
    Only 10 printed per player. Big money card
    $200 — $2,000+
  • Nebula 1/1 Prizm
    True 1-of-1. The ultimate pull from any Prizm box
    $1,000 — $25,000+
  • Purple Wave /49
    Fan favorite parallel. Looks fire in hand
    $50 — $500+
  • Color Blast Inserts
    Explosion of color. Collectors go crazy for these
    $15 — $150+
  • Prizm Autographs
    Guaranteed 2 autos per hobby box
    $75 — $800+
Box Types & Prices
📦 Retail Blaster ~$35–55
📦 Lazer Blaster ~$55
🏢 Hobby Box ~$250–400
🏆 Hobby Jumbo ~$700–1,200
🔥 HOTTEST SET
Hype Level
9.7

2024 Panini Prizm
FOOTBALL • NFL • CHROME TECHNOLOGY
2024
Top Chase Cards
  • Caleb Williams Silver Prizm RC
    The #1 rookie card of the 2024 class. Bear down
    $75 — $800+
  • Jayden Daniels Silver Prizm RC
    Commanders QB. ROY winner. Value is climbing
    $40 — $400+
  • Marvin Harrison Jr. RC
    Son of an HOF legend. Star in the making
    $20 — $200+
  • Gold Prizm RCs /10
    Any 2024 QB Gold Prizm = serious money
    $500 — $5,000+
  • Brock Bowers TE RC
    Record-setting rookie TE season. Underrated pull
    $15 — $150+
Box Types & Prices
📦 Blaster Box ~$50
📦 Disco Blaster ~$50
🏢 Hobby Box ~$300–500
🏆 Hobby Jumbo ~$800–1,500

Top Chase Cards
  • C.J. Stroud Silver Prizm RC
    Texans QB. Hottest 2023 rookie card on the market

    #1 overall pick. Panthers QB. High upside card
    $8 — $60+
  • Anthony Richardson RC
    Colts QB. Freaky athleticism. Big arm. Big card
    $15 — $120+
  • Will Levis RC
    Titans QB. Sneaky value pick in 2023 Prizm
    $5 — $40+

2025 Donruss Optic
FOOTBALL • NFL • CHROME FINISH
2025 NEW
Top Chase Cards
  • Downtown Insert
    City skyline design. Chrome finish. THE card to chase
    $75 — $800+
  • Downtown Gold /10
    Jayden Daniels version sold for $18,000 in 2024
    $5,000 — $30,000+
  • Rookie Kings Insert
    Neon spray paint design. Holographic shine. Very pop
    $25 — $250+
  • Downtown Duos
    Two players, one city. Pairs of stars on one card
    $40 — $400+
  • SSP Short Prints
    Super short prints. Rare action photo variants
    $15 — $150+
Box Types & Prices
📦 Retail Blaster ~$40–60
🏢 Hobby Box ~$280–450
🏆 Hobby Jumbo ~$800–1,400
🔥 DOWNTOWN HEAT
Hype Level
9.4
📚 How to Rip Smart
🎯
Know Your Chase Cards
Always research the key cards before you buy. Silver Prizms, Downtown inserts, and numbered parallels are usually the money cards.
💰
Budget Smart
Set a budget and stick to it. Retail blasters are great for beginners. Hobby boxes give better odds but cost more.
📈
Follow Performance
Player performance drives card values. Rookie QBs who play well early see their cards spike in value fast.
🔍
Check Recent Sales
Use eBay sold listings to see actual market prices. Card values change based on games, trades, and hype.
Built by Jude for card rippers who want to know what they're chasing.
Data updated regularly. Not financial advice — just here to help you rip smarter! 📡
